topic: Be Verb (Am, Is, Are, Was, Were)
keyPointsSummary: Be verb की 5 forms: am, is, are, was, were
Subject के अनुसार form बदलती है
5 main uses: identity, description, location, occupation, state
Am सिर्फ I के साथ — यह rule कभी नहीं बदलता
Present tense में use होता है
Identity, state, location, occupation सब के लिए
Is: He, She, It के साथ
Is: सभी singular nouns के साथ (Rahul, The dog, My teacher)
